title: Quality of Life of the Mentally Disabled 1991: Mildly Disabled
description: The project on the quality of life of the mentally disabled was set in motion by the research unit of the Finnish Association on Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities in 1989. The data were collected by face-to-face interviews. The quality of life of the mildly disabled was studied from several viewpoints.
